assertions.description: V2.0Beta: 15 footprints, 2-layer board (F.Cu/B.Cu), 112.05x78.25mm, 361 track segments, 195 vias, 10 zones, fully routed. DFM correctly identifies 0.127mm track spacing as borderline advanced tier. Board size exceeding 100x100mm correctly flagged for JLCPCB pricing. Courtyard overlap between J3 and C1 is a real design issue worth noting.
assertions.aspirational_reason: auto-generated check path incorrect for PCB/gerber output

assertions.description: P5V_AUX has a copper pour zone spanning both B.Cu and F.Cu with 65.3mm² area and 16 stitching vias (thermal_analysis shows this). It is the dominant power net on the board by zone area yet is absent from power_net_routing and current_capacity analysis. This is a consequence of P5V_AUX being a global label rather than a power:* symbol — the PCB analyzer fails to recognize it as a power net, so no track width or current capacity analysis is done for this rail.
